nasb.text: Let Me alone, that I may destroy them and blot out their name from under heaven; and I will make of you a nation mightier and greater than they.’

esv.text: Let me alone, that I may destroy them and blot out their name from under heaven. And I will make of you a nation mightier and greater than they.’

cnv.text: 你不要管我，我要消滅他們，把他們的名字從天下除去；我要使你成為一個比他們更強更大的國。’

ccb.text: 不要拦我，我要毁灭他们，从世上抹去他们的名字。我要使你的子孙成为一个比他们更强大的民族。’
